onboarding.welcomeSub: Your digital ledger for credit and payments

home.noShops: No shops yet. Tap + to add your first shop!
home.title: Baki Khata
home.emptyLedger: Your ledger is empty. Add a shop to start tracking your baki.
home.deleteShopConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will remove all history permanently.
home.cannotDeleteShopMsg: There is still a balance of ৳{{amount}} in this shop. Please clear all dues or advances before deleting the shop.

shop.cameraPermission: We need camera roll permissions to add a photo.

customer.name: Customer Name
customer.galleryPermission: We need permission to access your gallery

transaction.selectProductError: Please select at least one product
transaction.noProducts: No products found in this shop. Add products first.

payment.notePlaceholder: e.g. Paid by Cash, Bkash, etc.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize your ledger
settings.cameraPermission: We need camera roll permissions to update your photo.
settings.removePhotoMsg: Are you sure you want to remove your profile photo?
settings.clearCacheMsg: This will clear temporary files and image cache. Your ledger and profile data will be 100% safe.

product.cannotDelete: This product cannot be deleted because it has transaction history. Please delete the transactions first or just edit the product instead.
product.noProducts: No products yet. Tap the + button to add your first product!
product.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
product.enterDetails: Please enter product name and price

upcoming.title: Upcoming Updates
upcoming.subtitle: What's Coming Next
upcoming.downloadDesc: Download latest and previous versions of Baki Khata from GitHub.
upcoming.requestSubtitle: Have an idea to make Baki Khata better? Let us know!
upcoming.successMsg: Your feature request has been sent to our team. We'll review it soon!
upcoming.errorFill: Please fill in both the feature name and description.
upcoming.errorMail: Email app is not available on this device. Please email us directly at {{email}}

dashboard.title: Personal Dashboard
dashboard.desc: A powerful overview of your daily spending, total dues, and the shops where you owe the most.

sync.title: Cloud Sync & Multi-Device
sync.desc: Access your baki khata from any device with secure cloud backup.

advanced.title: Advanced Profile Management
advanced.desc: Manage multiple spending profiles or categories under a single ledger.

tutorial.doneDesc: You now know the basics of Baki Khata. Ready to manage your ledger?
tutorial.settingsNote: Note: You can watch this tutorial again anytime from Settings.

addShop.title: Add Your First Shop
addShop.desc: Tap the '+' button to add a shop and start tracking your baki.

shopDetails.title: Shop Overview
shopDetails.desc: See your total due to this shop at a glance and track your history.

quickEntry.title: Add Payment
quickEntry.desc: Whenever you pay money back to the shop, tap 'Add Payment' to record it.

manageProducts.title: Manage Products
manageProducts.desc: Setup products you buy from this shop to record entries even faster.

addProduct.title: Add New Product
addProduct.desc: Tap '+' to add a product with its name and default price.

deleteProduct.title: Remove Product
deleteProduct.desc: Swipe left on any product to remove it from your list.

recordPurchase.title: Record a Purchase
recordPurchase.desc: Simply tap on any product you bought to record a new baki entry.

restartLocation.title: Tutorial Location
restartLocation.desc: You can restart this tutorial anytime from the Settings menu here.
